name: Hot Buttered Rum Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter at medium speed with electric mixer until creamy. Add 1/2 cup sugar, beating well.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating just until blended after each addition.
3. Combine flour and next 4 ingredients (baking powder, salt, ground cloves, and ground nutmeg).
4. Mix milk and remaining 2 tablespoons rum separately.
5. Gradually combine the flour mixture with the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Beat well after each addition.
6. Fill greased muffin pans three-fourths full with batter.
7. Bake at 375°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden. Remove from pans immediately and place on a wire rack.
8. In a small saucepan, combine the remaining rum and sugar. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar dissolves. Brush warm muffins with the mixture.
